properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5 v2 v6 v2 v7 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: He was pierced and wounded, for all of our wrongs Carried our sorrows, although to us they ever belonged Through His sacrifice, our souls He has reclaimed By His wounds, we're mended and forever unashamed

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Healing in His name, oh, there's healing in His name, By the stripes of Jesus, every sickness overcame, Come and find the solace where His mercy reigns, Oh, there's healing, sweet healing, in His holy name.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: He forgives all our sins and heals all disease Redeems our life from the pit, brings our spirit ease Crowned with compassion, He renews our days In His love, there's healing in so many ways

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: The Lord sustains the weary, lifts them from despair With His mighty power, He answers every prayer A balm for every heartache, a cure for every pain His healing flows like rivers, through every vein

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: He sent His word to heal, to save from the grave In every storm season, He's the One who saves He calms the troubled waters, speaks peace to our soul By His hand, we're guided, in His presence, made whole.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Faith makes us whole, like the woman long ago Touched the hem of His garment, felt His power flow If we believe, He'll do just the same, There's healing for the asking in Jesus' mighty name….

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: In that land of glory, where tears shall never flow Every pain and sorrow, forever laid low In the presence of Jesus, where the saints abide We'll find eternal healing, by the Saviors side.
